breach.name: Tibber
breach.title: Tibber
breach.description: In November 2024, the German electricity provider Tibber suffered a data breach that exposed the personal information of 50k customers. The data included names, email addresses, geographic locations (city and postcode) and total spend on purchases.

content.aboutCompany: Tibber Deutschland GmbH is an electricity provider operating in Germany. The company offers services related to electricity supply.
keyTakeaways: On November 10, 2024, a data breach exposed the names, email addresses, geographic locations, and purchase details of 50,000 Tibber customers.
This incident is part of a pattern of data breaches attributed to Threat Actor 888.
Affected individuals should be vigilant about phishing attempts and unsolicited communications, as their email addresses and other personal details are now known to attackers.
content.incidentAndExposure: On November 10, 2024, Tibber Deutschland GmbH experienced a data breach that affected 50,000 customers. The exposed information includes customers' names, email addresses, geographic locations (city and postcode), and the total amount spent on purchases. The company has publicly acknowledged this incident, and it has been verified by Have I Been Pwned.
content.timelineAndCause: The data breach occurred on November 10, 2024, and was disclosed on December 14, 2024. The incident was carried out by an attacker identified as Threat Actor 888.
content.nextSteps: Given that email addresses and other personal details were exposed, affected individuals should be extremely cautious about unexpected emails or messages. Be wary of any communications that ask for personal information, login credentials, or direct you to suspicious websites. It is advisable to enable two-factor authentication on all online accounts where available to add an extra layer of security. Regularly review your account statements for any unusual activity, especially given that purchase information was also exposed.
